name: Bandit Ambush
description: A ragged band of highwaymen springs from the undergrowth, blades drawn and eyes wild with desperation. Their leader barks a demand for coin, but the set of his jaw says he means to take more than gold.
failureConsequence: The bandits strip you of supplies and leave you bruised on the roadside. You lose a day recovering and must press on with lighter pockets.
